name: Refrigerator Ice Cream - Condensed Milk Base
recipeInstructions:
A. Combine the sweetened condensed milk, milk, salt, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Pour the mixture into a refrigerator tray to freeze.
B. When the mixture is removed from the freezer after the first freezing, whip the heavy cream until it just holds its shape. Mix the whipped cream into the chilled mixture before storing it back in the freezer to complete the final freezing process.
Note: This recipe may be used as the cooked base in any of the following recipe variations.
